case_title: CYNTHIA LEWIS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SF

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEWIS, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS, CYNTHIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGURED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAIN.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEWIS, CYNTHIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF
